title: Workflow test issue: configuration completed successfully
body:
Kind: validation
Severity: low
Confidence: high

This is a synthetic workflow-verification issue used to confirm that the JSON batch, GitHub CLI authentication, repository targeting, and issue-creation script are configured correctly.

Proposed fix:

- no code change is required
- close this issue after confirming that the workflow is running as expected

This issue should be created only as a one-off configuration test.
